case_title: JUANA HERNANDEZ VS. MARIA LOURDES ZAMUDIO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, JUANA AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMUDIO, MARIA LOURDES EACH INDIVIDUALLY HONORATO, LILIANA EACH INDIVIDUALLY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, JUANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAMUDIO, MARIA LOURDES EACH INDIVIDUALLY HONORATO, LILIANA EACH INDIVIDUALLY $3,582.65 PRINCIPAL, $35.83 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,818.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
